title: linderniella pusilla
intro: Linderniella pusilla is a small, annual herbaceous plant, often found in tropical and subtropical regions, and is also known as the Dwarf toadshade. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Linderniella pusilla has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating gastrointestinal problems. The plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
